name: Destroy Entities
desc: Removes one or more entities from the client's render list.

fields.name: entityIDs
fields.desc: Array of entity IDs to destroy

notes: This is how entities are removed when they die, despawn, or players disconnect.

implementation.overview: Removes entities by ID array. Modules: ESP (remove from lists), KillAura, TargetManager.

modules.name: Target cleanup
modules.purpose: Remove destroyed entities from target lists.
